#outlook a { padding:0; } body { margin:0;padding:0;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-ms-text-size-adjust:100%; } table, td { border-collapse:collapse;mso-table-lspace:0pt;mso-table-rspace:0pt; } img { border:0;height:auto;line-height:100%; outline:none;text-decoration:none;-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic; } p { display:block;margin:13px 0; } 96 .mj-outlook-group-fix { width:100% !important; } @media only screen and (min-width:0px) { .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } } .moz-text-html .mj-column-per-100 { width:100% !important; max-width: 100%; } @media only screen and (max-width:-1px) { table.mj-full-width-mobile { width: 100% !important; } td.mj-full-width-mobile { width: auto !important; } } .mjml-body { width: 375px; margin: 0px auto; } a {color: inherit} a:hover {color: inherit} a:active {color: inherit} Share Your Thoughts, Earn a Gift Card Hi there, At TRAE, your experience means everything to us. That’s why we’d love to hear your feedback in our short user survey — it’ll only take at most 15-20 minutes of your time. As a thank you for helping us make TRAE even better, the first 1000 users who provide qualified responses will 100% win a $5 gift card . Take the Survey Now Your insights will help us improve features, shape future updates, and build the best possible experience for you. Thanks for being part of the TRAE community — we can’t wait to hear what you think! — The TRAE Team Follow us for updates, tutorials, and community highlights: Discord YouTube X/Twitter To help make your experience with TRAE the best it can be, we’ll send occasional updates about news, offers, or other resources. If you no longer want to receive any updates from us, feel free to unsubscribe at any time.
